setup.label: Wait for Lab IDE to load

steps.label: Show the Widget Lab IDE

capture.annotation: Widget Lab — where creators build apps

steps.narration: This is the Widget Lab — StickerNest's built-in IDE for creating widgets.

steps.label: Click into the AI prompt bar
steps.narration: Type a widget idea into the AI prompt bar to start generating.

steps.label: Type a widget prompt

action.text: Build a weather dashboard with live temperature and forecast

steps.narration: We want a weather dashboard. But instead of generating immediately...

steps.label: Submit to trigger refinement overlay
steps.narration: The prompt refinement overlay slides in — clarifying questions, compatible widgets, and quick toggles. All before a single line of code is generated.

steps.label: Show AI clarifying questions

capture.annotation: AI asks smart questions before building

steps.narration: The AI asks clarifying questions: What data sources? What visual style? What interactions? Better input = better output.

steps.label: Answer a clarifying question
steps.narration: Answer the questions to give the AI more context. Every answer sharpens the result.

steps.label: Toggle interactive mode and dark mode

capture.annotation: Quick toggles: interactive, dark mode, events

steps.narration: Quick toggles let you set preferences without typing — interactive mode, dark mode, event emission.

steps.label: Click Generate with enriched prompt
steps.narration: Hit Generate. The enriched prompt — original idea + answers + toggles + compatible widgets — all feeds into the AI. The result is dramatically better than a raw prompt.

metadata.hook: Your AI doesn't just build what you type — it asks the right questions first.
metadata.cta: StickerNest V5 — where widgets build themselves. Follow for more.
metadata.description: StickerNest's Widget Lab now features a prompt refinement overlay that asks clarifying questions before AI generates your widget. Better input → dramatically better output.
